scripts.dev:all: powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','cd frontend; npm.cmd run dev'; npm.cmd run dev"
scripts.verify:deploy: node -c server.js && node -c index.js && node -c core/marketing.js && node -c core/marketingPrompts.js && node -c core/marketingTemplates.js && node -c tools/marketingUtils.js && npm.cmd test && npm.cmd run test:nexus-guards && cd frontend && npm.cmd run build -- --configLoader native
scripts.test:e2e-critical:plan: node -e "console.log('See tests/TOOL_STABILITY_PLAN.md for the critical E2E execution order.')"
